scope_note: QA Fibonacci Pisano Type Distribution cert [427]. Primary sources: Lucas, E. (1878) 'Theorie des fonctions numeriques simplement periodiques' American Journal of Mathematics 1(2) pp. 184-240 doi:10.2307/2369308 (Lucas numbers L_n; L_n = F_{n+1}+F_{n-1}; bridge between GL2 trace and Pisano scalar); Wall, D.D. (1960) 'Fibonacci series modulo m' American Mathematical Monthly 67(6) pp. 525-532 doi:10.2307/2309169 (Pisano period T(p); type classification: T=alpha, T=2*alpha, T=4*alpha; foundational for [416]-[426] chain); Euler, L. (1750) 'Theoremata circa divisores numerorum' Novi Commentarii Academiae Scientiarum Petropolitanae 1 pp. 20-48 (Euler criterion: -1 is QR mod p iff p ≡ 1 mod 4; equivalently Legendre symbol (-1/p)=(p%4==1?1:-1); used in C1 Type Gate proof); Pearson, K. (1900) 'On the criterion that a given system of deviations from the probable in the case of a correlated system of variables is such that it can be reasonably supposed to have arisen from random sampling' Philosophical Magazine 50 pp. 157-175 (chi-squared goodness-of-fit; df=1 for 2 types, df=2 for 3 types). CLAIM (narrow and falsifiable): (C1) Type gate: ord(epsilon(p))=4 iff p ≡ 1 mod 4 AND alpha(p) is odd; proved from epsilon^2=(-1)^alpha and Euler criterion; no Type 4 found for p ≡ 3 mod 4 in [7,500]; all 406 Type 4 primes in [7,10000] satisfy p ≡ 1 mod 4. (C2) Lucas bridge: L_{alpha(p)} ≡ 2*epsilon(p) mod p for all primes in [7,500]; proved: F_{alpha+1}=F_alpha+F_{alpha-1}≡0+epsilon=epsilon mod p; so L_alpha=F_{alpha+1}+F_{alpha-1}=2*epsilon mod p; verified 92/92. (C3) Equal halves among p≡3 mod 4: chi^2=0.026 < 3.841 (df=1, alpha=0.05); n=618 primes in [7,10000]; counts={Type1:307, Type2:311}. (C4) Equal thirds over all primes: chi^2=0.046 < 5.991 (df=2, alpha=0.05); n=1226 primes in [7,10000]; counts={Type1:412, Type2:408, Type4:406}. EQUAL-THIRDS DECOMPOSITION: p≡3 mod 4 (density 1/2, Types 1+2 only, equal halves) contributes (1/4,1/4,0); p≡1 mod 4 (density 1/2, Types 1+2+4, with Type 4 at 2/3 of this class) contributes (1/12,1/12,1/3); combined = (1/3,1/3,1/3). KRONECKER GATE: -1 is QR mod p iff p≡1 mod 4 iff Kronecker symbol (-4/p)=+1; Type 4 is the class where epsilon is a primitive 4th root of unity, requiring -1 is QR. LUCAS BRIDGE: L_{alpha(p)}=2*epsilon(p) connects the GL2 trace (Lucas numbers, cert [426] C1) to the GL2 scalar (epsilon, [426] C3); three types: L_alpha ≡ +2 (Type1), L_alpha ≡ -2 (Type2), L_alpha^2 ≡ -4 (Type4). THEOREM NT: All 4 checks pure integer in QA layer; observer layer: chi-squared tests (float, lawful). 4 checks PASS; self-test ok. Derived 2026-06-15.
